intro: Ceraia tenuis, also known as Ceraia tenuis, is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia, characterized by its delicate and slender stems. The health benefits of Ceraia tenuis include its potential to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its use in traditional medicine for the treatment of various ailments, such as fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Ceraia tenuis is commonly prepared as a decoction or infused in tea, and is also used in the formulation of various herbal remedies, including tonics and infusions, to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
